records.question: Show the different Rank in the table Faculty
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Rank FROM Faculty

records.question: List all the Grade and Days from the table Enrolled_in and the table Course where CID is the same
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.`Grade`, T2.`Days` FROM `Enrolled_in` AS T1 JOIN `Course` AS T2 ON T1.`CID`=T2.`CID`
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Grade, T2.Days FROM Enrolled_in AS T1 INNER JOIN Course AS T2 ON T1.CID = T2.CID

records.question: List the CName which average of DNO is at least 496.25 in table Course
records.gold_sql: SELECT `CName` FROM `Course` GROUP BY `CName` HAVING AVG(`DNO`) >= 496.25
records.pred_sql: SELECT CName FROM Course GROUP BY CName HAVING AVG(DNO) >= 496.25

records.question: List all the Days and Lname from the table Course and the table Faculty where Instructor is the same
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.`Days`, T2.`Lname` FROM `Course` AS T1 JOIN `Faculty` AS T2 ON T1.`Instructor`=T2.`FacID`
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Days, T2.Lname FROM Course AS T1 INNER JOIN Faculty AS T2 ON T1.Instructor = T2.FacID

records.question: Find all the Days that have at least 6 records in table Course
records.gold_sql: SELECT `Days` FROM `Course` GROUP BY `Days` HAVING count(*) >= 6
records.pred_sql: SELECT Days FROM Course GROUP BY Days HAVING count(*) >= 6

records.question: What are the Rank with all the Building in table Faculty?
records.gold_sql: SELECT `Rank` FROM `Faculty` GROUP BY `Rank` HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT `Building`) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT `Building`) FROM `Faculty`)
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Rank FROM Faculty

records.question: What are the LName with all the Sex in table Student?
